description_long: This guard stone is a rectangular, upright block made of stone, featuring a detailed relief carving on its front face. The relief depicts a historical figure in traditional attire, complete with a feathered hat and ornate cloak, framed by a decorative border. Below the portrait, there is an inscription in a stylized script, likely denoting the name or title of the individual. The sides and back of the object are plain and angular, with a slightly tapered profile, and the top surface is flat. The stone surface shows subtle textural variations, suggesting weathering and age, while the relief itself is well-preserved and visually prominent. The overall appearance is that of a commemorative or protective urban element, possibly marking a historical site or serving as a boundary marker.
description: A rectangular stone guard stone with a carved relief of a historical figure on the front, bordered and inscribed, with plain, angular sides and a flat top.
description_view_0: The front view displays the detailed relief carving of a historical figure, framed and inscribed, making this the most visually intricate side.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the plain, angular profile of the stone, with no carvings or inscriptions visible.
description_view_2: The top view shows a flat, rectangular surface with no visible markings or features, emphasizing the block-like shape.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the plain, slightly tapered stone surface without any decorative elements.
attribute_location: Typically found at the edge of urban sidewalks, near historical sites, or at the entrance to courtyards, often adjacent to pedestrian pathways or building facades.
attribute_installation_orientation: Meant to be installed fully above ground, standing upright and flush with the pavement or ground surface.
attribute_wear_patterns: Likely to show chipping and smoothing on the edges and corners from occasional vehicle or pedestrian contact, as well as surface discoloration and erosion from prolonged exposure to weather elements. The relief carving may exhibit minor smoothing on protruding details due to environmental wear.
attribute_historical_markings: The front face features a relief carving of a historical figure, framed by a decorative border, with an inscription below the portrait in stylized script.
